title: 3 Simple Habits for a Longer Life

segments.text: The longest-living people share a few simple habits.
And none of them involve a gym membership.
They move gently all day, not just once.
They eat mostly plants and stop before they're full.
And they stay close to friends and family.
Connection may matter as much as diet.
Follow for daily tips your body will thank you for.

description: The longest-living people keep it simple. Follow for daily health tips!
